description: This class includes activities incidental to agricultural production and activities similar to agriculture not undertaken for production purposes (in the sense of harvesting agricultural products), done on a fee or contract basis. Also includes post-harvest crop activities aimed at preparing agricultural products for the primary market.
includes: agricultural activities on a fee or contract basis: preparation of fields; setting up, planting, cultivating crops; crop spraying (including from the air); pruning of fruit trees and vines; transplanting of rice, thinning of beets; harvesting
operation of irrigation systems for agricultural purposes
provision of farm-related machinery with operators and crew
excludes: landscape care and maintenance services, see 8130
agronomic and agricultural economic advisers, see 7490
agricultural fairs and shows organisation, see 8230
